task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the ArkCase application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (potentially showing the user profile 'arkcase-admin').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the correct FOIA complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The complaint specifically titled 'FOIA Request - Climate Change Adaptation Plans - EPA FY2022' is visible on the screen, either in search results, a case list, or opened in a detailed case view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the action to close the complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, modal, or specific screen for closing the case/complaint is open and visible in the ArkCase interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact required closing note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'All responsive documents have been released. 247 pages provided in full. No exemptions applied. Case resolved within statutory timeframe.' is visible inside a text area, input field, or comment box associated with the case closing dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the complaint was successfully closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status of the complaint 'FOIA Request - Climate Change Adaptation Plans - EPA FY2022' is explicitly shown as 'Closed', or a system success message confirming the closure is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ArkCase web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions (logging in, searching, closing) take place within a web browser displaying the ArkCase interface, rather than in a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing curl commands, database queries (SQL), or API scripts being used to change the case status directly.

integrity.description: Verify the closing note was entered into the correct application field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required closing note is typed or pasted directly into the ArkCase web interface's designated note/reason field, not just written in a separate notepad or echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ArkCase login credentials are username: 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' and password: 'ArkCase1234!'. The target complaint title is exactly 'FOIA Request - Climate Change Adaptation Plans - EPA FY2022'. This is a synthetic test environment using simulated FOIA data.
